demo.title: shopify-graphql.sh
demo.code:
shop_gql() {
  local query="$1"
  local variables="${2:-{}}"
  curl -sS -X POST \
    "https://${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}/admin/api/${SHOPIFY_API_VERSION:-2026-01}/graphql.json" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H "X-Shopify-Access-Token: ${SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
    --data "$(jq -nc --arg q "$query" --argjson v "$variables" '{query: $q, variables: $v}')"
}

# List active products
shop_gql '{ products(first: 20, query: "status:active") { edges { node { id title handle } } } }' | jq

# Fetch paid orders
shop_gql '{ orders(first: 20, reverse: true, query: "financial_status:paid") { edges { node { id name createdAt } } } }' | jq

setup: Create a Shopify app with only the Admin API scopes needed for the task
Set `SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN`, `SHOPIFY_API_VERSION`, and `BANKR_API_KEY` for Bankr bridge flows
